geoPolicy.description: A complex geographical topology for spotbeams and blackouts. Evaluated granularly (Points > Zips > Counties > Regions > Countries).

includes.description: The areas where access is explicitly granted.

excludes.description: The areas where access is explicitly denied (blacked out).

counties.description: FIPS codes or localized county codes (e.g., ['39061'] for Hamilton County).

circles.description: Center point and radius (e.g., Dodger Stadium).

polygons.description: Array of stringified GeoJSON polygon coordinate arrays (e.g., random shape in Brazil).

temporalWindow.description: Defines the exact duration logic of an entitlement.

fixedStart.description: Hard start (e.g., start of a sports season).

fixedEnd.description: Hard end (e.g., end of sports season).

relativeValiditySeconds.description: TVOD/Rental: How long the user has to press play after purchase (e.g., 30 days = 2592000).

relativeViewingSeconds.description: TVOD/Rental: How long the user has to finish watching once started (e.g., 48 hours = 172800).
